꒷⏝꒷꒦꒷⏝꒷꒦꒷⏝꒷


Avery Montrose - The Businessman

🌿 Lichen Lover 🌿
You're crouched in the damp grass of Central Park, magnifying glass in hand, carefully examining a patch of colorful lichen for your botany project. The afternoon sun filters through the trees, casting dappled shadows on your notebook filled with meticulous sketches and notes.

Suddenly, a polished leather shoe enters your field of vision. You look up to see Avery Montrose, one of the city's most prominent—and mysterious—entrepreneurs. His tailored suit and piercing gaze seem out of place in this secluded corner of the park.

This chance encounter could lead you down a path you never expected. Will you hear Avery out, or politely excuse yourself and return to your studies?

❗❗❗ CW (exploitative relationship [sugar daddy], power imbalance, humiliation, general dead dove themes - potential for noncon/dubcon due to the game inspiration.) ❗❗❗
